lines.english: Lesson 40
lines.chinese: 第40课
lines.raw: Lesson 40 | 第40课

lines.english: Who's who
lines.chinese: 谁是谁
lines.raw: Who's who | 谁是谁

lines.english: How did the policeman discover that the whole thing was a joke?
lines.chinese: 警察是如何发现这整件事是个恶作剧的？
lines.raw: How did the policeman discover that the whole thing was a joke? | 警察是如何发现这整件事是个恶作剧的？

lines.english: It has never been explained why university students seem to enjoy practical jokes more than anyone else.
lines.chinese: 大学学生为什么似乎比其他人更喜欢恶作剧，这一点从未得到解释。
lines.raw: It has never been explained why university students seem to enjoy practical jokes more than anyone else. | 大学学生为什么似乎比其他人更喜欢恶作剧，这一点从未得到解释。

lines.english: Students specialize in a particular type of practical joke: the hoax.
lines.chinese: 学生们擅长一种特殊类型的恶作剧：骗局。
lines.raw: Students specialize in a particular type of practical joke: the hoax. | 学生们擅长一种特殊类型的恶作剧：骗局。

lines.english: Inviting the fire brigade to put out a nonexistent fire is a crude form of deception which no self-respecting student would ever indulde in.
lines.chinese: 邀请消防队扑灭一场不存在的火灾是一种粗俗的欺骗形式，任何有自尊的学生都不会沉溺其中。
lines.raw: Inviting the fire brigade to put out a nonexistent fire is a crude form of deception which no self-respecting student would ever indulde in. | 邀请消防队扑灭一场不存在的火灾是一种粗俗的欺骗形式，任何有自尊的学生都不会沉溺其中。

lines.english: Students often create amusing situations which are funny to everyone except the victims.
lines.chinese: 学生们经常制造一些有趣的场面，除了受害者，每个人都觉得好笑。
lines.raw: Students often create amusing situations which are funny to everyone except the victims. | 学生们经常制造一些有趣的场面，除了受害者，每个人都觉得好笑。

lines.english: When a student recently saw two workmen using a pneumatic drill outside his university,
lines.chinese: 最近，当一名学生看到两名工人在他大学外面使用一台气动钻时，
lines.raw: When a student recently saw two workmen using a pneumatic drill outside his university, | 最近，当一名学生看到两名工人在他大学外面使用一台气动钻时，

lines.english: he immediately telephoned the police and informed them that two students dressed up as workmen
lines.chinese: 他立即打电话报警，并告知警察有两名打扮成工人的学生
lines.raw: he immediately telephoned the police and informed them that two students dressed up as workmen | 他立即打电话报警，并告知警察有两名打扮成工人的学生

lines.english: were tearing up the road with a pneumatic drill.
lines.chinese: 正在用气动钻挖路。
lines.raw: were tearing up the road with a pneumatic drill. | 正在用气动钻挖路。

lines.english: As soon as he had hung up, he went over to the workmen and told them that if a policeman ordered them to go away,
lines.chinese: 他一挂掉电话，就走到工人那里，告诉他们如果一个警察命令他们离开，
lines.raw: As soon as he had hung up, he went over to the workmen and told them that if a policeman ordered them to go away, | 他一挂掉电话，就走到工人那里，告诉他们如果一个警察命令他们离开，

lines.english: they were not to take him seriously.
lines.chinese: 他们不必把他当真。
lines.raw: they were not to take him seriously. | 他们不必把他当真。

lines.english: He added that a student had dressed up as a policeman and was playing all sorts of silly jokes on people.
lines.chinese: 他补充说，有个学生打扮成警察，正在对人们开各种愚蠢的玩笑。
lines.raw: He added that a student had dressed up as a policeman and was playing all sorts of silly jokes on people. | 他补充说，有个学生打扮成警察，正在对人们开各种愚蠢的玩笑。

lines.english: Both the police and the workmen were grateful to the student for this piece of advance information.
lines.chinese: 警察和工人都很感谢这名学生提供的这条提前消息。
lines.raw: Both the police and the workmen were grateful to the student for this piece of advance information. | 警察和工人都很感谢这名学生提供的这条提前消息。

lines.english: The student hid in an archway nearby where he could watch and hear everything that went on.
lines.chinese: 这名学生藏在附近的一个拱门里，在那里他能看到和听到发生的一切。
lines.raw: The student hid in an archway nearby where he could watch and hear everything that went on. | 这名学生藏在附近的一个拱门里，在那里他能看到和听到发生的一切。

lines.english: Sure enough, a policeman arrived on the scene and politely asked the workmen to go away.
lines.chinese: 果不其然，一名警察来到了现场，并礼貌地要求工人离开。
lines.raw: Sure enough, a policeman arrived on the scene and politely asked the workmen to go away. | 果不其然，一名警察来到了现场，并礼貌地要求工人离开。

lines.english: When he received a very rude reply from one of the workmen, he threatened to remove them by force.
lines.chinese: 当他从其中一名工人那里得到非常粗鲁的答复时，他威胁要强行把他们带走。
lines.raw: When he received a very rude reply from one of the workmen, he threatened to remove them by force. | 当他从其中一名工人那里得到非常粗鲁的答复时，他威胁要强行把他们带走。

lines.english: The workmen told him to do as he pleased and the policeman telephoned for help.
lines.chinese: 工人们告诉他想怎样就怎样，于是警察打电话请求支援。
lines.raw: The workmen told him to do as he pleased and the policeman telephoned for help. | 工人们告诉他想怎样就怎样，于是警察打电话请求支援。

lines.english: Shortly afterwards, 4 more policemen arrived and remonstrated with the workmen.
lines.chinese: 不久之后，又有4名警察赶到，并与工人们进行交涉。
lines.raw: Shortly afterwards, 4 more policemen arrived and remonstrated with the workmen. | 不久之后，又有4名警察赶到，并与工人们进行交涉。

lines.english: As the men refused to stop working, the police attempted to seize the pneumatic drill.
lines.chinese: 由于工人们拒绝停止工作，警察试图没收气动钻。
lines.raw: As the men refused to stop working, the police attempted to seize the pneumatic drill. | 由于工人们拒绝停止工作，警察试图没收气动钻。

lines.english: The workmen struggled fiercely and one of them lost his temper.
lines.chinese: 工人们激烈反抗，其中一人发了脾气。
lines.raw: The workmen struggled fiercely and one of them lost his temper. | 工人们激烈反抗，其中一人发了脾气。

lines.english: He threatened to call the police.
lines.chinese: 他威胁要报警。
lines.raw: He threatened to call the police. | 他威胁要报警。

lines.english: At this, the police pointed out ironically that this would hardly be necessary as the men were already under arrest.
lines.chinese: 听罢此言，警察讽刺地指出，这几乎没有必要，因为这些人已经被逮捕了。
lines.raw: At this, the police pointed out ironically that this would hardly be necessary as the men were already under arrest. | 听罢此言，警察讽刺地指出，这几乎没有必要，因为这些人已经被逮捕了。

lines.english: Pretending to speak seriously, one of the workmen asked if he might make a telephone call before being taken to the station.
lines.chinese: 其中一名工人假装认真地问道，在被带到警察局之前，他是否可以打个电话。
lines.raw: Pretending to speak seriously, one of the workmen asked if he might make a telephone call before being taken to the station. | 其中一名工人假装认真地问道，在被带到警察局之前，他是否可以打个电话。

lines.english: Permission was granted and a policeman accompanied him to a pay phone.
lines.chinese: 许可被准予，一名警察陪他去了公用电话亭。
lines.raw: Permission was granted and a policeman accompanied him to a pay phone. | 许可被准予，一名警察陪他去了公用电话亭。

lines.english: Only when he saw that the man was actually telephoning the police did he realize that they had all been the victims of a hoax.
lines.chinese: 只有当他看到那个人实际上是在打电话给警察时，他才意识到他们都成了骗局的受害者。
lines.raw: Only when he saw that the man was actually telephoning the police did he realize that they had all been the victims of a hoax. | 只有当他看到那个人实际上是在打电话给警察时，他才意识到他们都成了骗局的受害者。
